title: Dating Advice | #shorts
full_text: Mom, I went on a really good date today. >> Okay. How was it? >> It was so good. But I'm not sure if I should wait to text or do I text now? >> Never. You can never text him. Your dad is still waiting for me to text him. >> But what if he loses interest? >> No. Everybody knows the saying is the saying. It's like, why will he buy the cow if he can get the milk for free? You never ever be the Dexter. >> The cow. >> Yes. Why will he ever commit if you're going to just give it all away for free? What a way. Everything, including the texting. What else? I have to explain everything to you guys. Just sit there quietly and pretend like the date never happened.
